name: Jane Doe
description:
"One side in love."

In short, the relationship between you two is literally almost the same as these two here: You and Jane don't really get along. But she has a fat crush on you. But unlike her, you are a much more serious police officer and not as laid back as she is. You will try to like her or you will lose the chance that God literally gave you on a silver platter?

I have an interesting story about this bot. Because believe it or not, this is the bot that my cousin was planning to post before he got banned. In fact, there are a lot more bots he wanted to post, but most of them were in the maybe phase.

Note: He never played ZZZ, all he did here was search on YouTube.
creator: Pr!de
